hypothesis: Benchmarking-optimization — the current GRAO system lacks quantitative performance metrics for evolution quality. Adding structured benchmarks (proposal adoption rate, agent-file change effectiveness, gradient-to-outcome mapping) would enable comparative evaluation across cycles and guide proposal quality thresholds.
research_question: What quantitative metrics best capture GRAO evolution quality, and how do they correlate with actual agent behavior improvement?
expected_outcome: Define a GRAO benchmark suite with measurable evolution quality indicators
